title: Specify survey metadata.json
description: Validates the structure of a source survey metadata file. One file per legacy-code source, recording coarse source facts. Defined by RFC-20 §Artifacts.

version.description: Schema version. Must be 1; bumps require an RFC update.

source-key.description: Kebab-case identifier for the legacy source this file describes.

language.description: Primary programming language of the source (e.g. typescript, python).

loc.description: Production lines of code (excluding tests, generated code, vendored deps, blank lines, comment-only lines).

module-count.description: Number of modules in the source.

top-level-modules.description: Names of top-level modules in the source.
